summary: Verified 5 targeted changes on MobileServiceLanding.js for FixitBay mobile service pages. All tests PASSED.

minor_observations.observation: 2 LocalBusiness schemas present (one from MobileServiceLanding, one from parent component) with slightly different address formatting ('1549 Franklin St, Unit A' vs '1549 Franklin Street Unit A'). Not a critical issue but could be consolidated.

sticky_bar_removed.details: No element with class 'mobile-sticky-bar' or data-testid 'sticky-bottom-bar' found

local_business_schema.details: LocalBusiness schema exists with name='FixitBay LLC', telephone='+17605435733', address='1549 Franklin St, Unit A', aggregateRating={ratingValue:'4.9', reviewCount:'87'}

breadcrumb_dedup.details: Exactly 1 BreadcrumbList schema found - dedup logic working correctly

eyebrow_text_brands.details: Brands section eyebrow shows 'Appliances We Service' (not 'We Service')

eyebrow_text_how_it_works.details: How-It-Works section eyebrow source text is 'How It Works' (CSS textTransform:uppercase displays it visually as uppercase)

faq_touch_targets.details: FAQ buttons have minHeight:52px (>48px), display:flex, alignItems:center, cursor:pointer. Actual rendered height: 61px

hero_section.details: Hero renders with h1, breadcrumb navigation, trust badges (4.9⭐, Same-Day, 180-Day, License), book button, call button

mobile_viewport_rendering.details: Page renders correctly on 375x812 mobile viewport

context_for_next_testing_agent: MobileServiceLanding.js changes verified. All 5 targeted changes confirmed working: 1) Internal sticky bar removed, 2) LocalBusiness schema added, 3) H2/eyebrow text capitalization fixed, 4) BreadcrumbList dedup logic working, 5) FAQ touch targets have minHeight:52px. Note: There are 2 LocalBusiness schemas on service pages (one from MobileServiceLanding, one from parent) - this is a minor observation, not a bug.
